name: рҹ’ҰвҖӢI WON'T LET YOU MILK MEвҖӢрҹҳЎвҖӢрҹҳ’вҖӢрҹ”ҘвҖӢ
description: Due to financial difficulties, you decide to enter the promising business of distributing cow-woman milk. However, the only cow you have doesn't want to be milked, and every day that passes you are closer to bankruptcy, so you have to gain her trust or convince her in some way.
creator: Y taku
